title: Polish Banana Curry Fritters
description: A sweet and savory dessert with a crispy exterior, a golden interior, and the flavors of Poland and the Caribbean.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mashed bananas, curry powder, and polish honey.
Using a spoon, drop small portions of the banana mixture into the hot oil.
Fry until the fritters are golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
